sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ap.id) FROM a_position_t ap WHERE ap.validflag >0
ifnull((select count(app.id) from a_position_personnel_t app where app.positionid=ap.id and app.validflag>0 and app.personnelid=#personnelid#),0)>0
ap.positionname like concat('%',#positionname#,'%')
ap.positiontype like concat('%',#positiontype#,'%')
ap.positioncharacter like concat('%',#positioncharacter#,'%')
FIND_IN_SET(ap.jdunit,#jdunit#)
ap.jdunit = #unitFilter#
ap.jdpolice = #personFilter#

SELECT ap.*,dt.departname AS unitname,ut.staffName AS policename FROM a_position_t ap LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON ap.jdunit = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON ap.jdpolice = ut.id WHERE ap.validflag >0
ifnull((select count(app.id) from a_position_personnel_t app where app.positionid=ap.id and app.validflag>0 and app.personnelid=#personnelid#),0)>0
ap.positionname like concat('%',#positionname#,'%')
ap.positiontype like concat('%',#positiontype#,'%')
ap.positioncharacter like concat('%',#positioncharacter#,'%')
FIND_IN_SET(ap.jdunit,#jdunit#)
ap.jdunit = #unitFilter#
ap.jdpolice = #personFilter#
order by ap.addtime desc

SELECT ap.*,dt.departname AS unitname,ut.staffName AS policename FROM a_position_t ap LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON ap.jdunit = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON ap.jdpolice = ut.id WHERE ap.id=#id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO a_position_t (positionname,positiontype,positioncharacter,foreignname, setuptime,setupplace,address,placearea, personnum,chargeunit,positionsurvey,jdunit, jdpolice,jdphone, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$positionname$','$positiontype$','$positioncharacter$','$foreignname$', '$setuptime$','$setupplace$','$address$','$placearea$', '$personnum$','$chargeunit$','$positionsurvey$','$jdunit$', '$jdpolice$','$jdphone$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE a_position_t SET positionname=#positionname#,positiontype=#positiontype#,positioncharacter=#positioncharacter#,foreignname=#foreignname#, setuptime=#setuptime#,setupplace=#setupplace#,address=#address#,placearea=#placearea#, personnum=#personnum#,chargeunit=#chargeunit#,positionsurvey=#positionsurvey#,jdunit=#jdunit#, jdpolice=#jdpolice#,jdphone=#jdphone#, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
UPDATE a_position_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ap.id) FROM a_position_card_t ap WHERE ap.validflag >0 and ap.positionid=#positionid#
ap.cardname like concat('%',#cardname#,'%')
ap.cardno like concat('%',#cardno#,'%')
ap.cardunit like concat('%',#cardunit#,'%')

SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_card_t ap WHERE ap.validflag >0 and ap.positionid=#positionid#
ap.cardname like concat('%',#cardname#,'%')
ap.cardno like concat('%',#cardno#,'%')
ap.cardunit like concat('%',#cardunit#,'%')
order by ap.addtime desc
SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_card_t ap WHERE ap.id=#id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO a_position_card_t (positionid, cardname,cardno,validdate,cardunit, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES (#positionid#, #cardname#,#cardno#,#validdate#,#cardunit#, #validflag#,#addoperator#,#addtime#,#memo#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE a_position_card_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_card_t ap WHERE ap.positionid=#positionid# and ap.validflag>0 order by ap.addtime

SELECT COUNT(ap.id) FROM a_position_personnel_t ap WHERE ap.validflag >0
ap.positionid=#positionid#
ap.personnelid=#personnelid#
ap.identity like concat('%',#identity#,'%')
ap.personname like concat('%',#personname#,'%')
ap.cardnumber like concat('%',#cardnumber#,'%')
ap.homeplace like concat('%',#homeplace#,'%')
ap.telnumber like concat('%',#telnumber#,'%')

SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_personnel_t ap WHERE ap.validflag >0
ap.positionid=#positionid#
ap.personnelid=#personnelid#
ap.identity like concat('%',#identity#,'%')
ap.personname like concat('%',#personname#,'%')
ap.cardnumber like concat('%',#cardnumber#,'%')
ap.homeplace like concat('%',#homeplace#,'%')
ap.telnumber like concat('%',#telnumber#,'%')
order by ap.addtime desc
SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_personnel_t ap WHERE ap.id=#id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO a_position_personnel_t (positionid,personnelid, identity,personname,cardnumber,homeplace,telnumber, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES (#positionid#,#personnelid#, #identity#,#personname#,#cardnumber#,#homeplace#,#telnumber#, #validflag#,#addoperator#,#addtime#,#memo#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE a_position_personnel_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ap.* FROM a_position_personnel_t ap WHERE ap.positionid=#positionid# and ap.validflag>0 order by ap.addtime
SELECT COUNT(ape.id) FROM a_position_event_t ape WHERE ape.validflag >0 and ape.positionid=#positionid#
SELECT ape.* FROM a_position_event_t ape WHERE ape.validflag >0 and ape.positionid=#positionid# order by ape.addtime desc
SELECT ape.* FROM a_position_event_t ape WHERE ape.id=#id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO a_position_event_t (positionid,eventTime,eventInfo, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES (#positionid#,#eventTime#,#eventInfo#, #validflag#,#addoperator#,#addtime#,#memo#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE a_position_event_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ape.* FROM a_position_event_t ape WHERE ape.positionid=#positionid# and ape.validflag>0 order by ape.addtime
SELECT COUNT(apw.id) FROM a_position_workrecord_t apw WHERE apw.validflag >0 and apw.positionid=#positionid#
SELECT apw.* FROM a_position_workrecord_t apw WHERE apw.validflag >0 and apw.positionid=#positionid# order by apw.addtime desc
SELECT apw.* FROM a_position_workrecord_t apw WHERE apw.id=#id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO a_position_workrecord_t (positionid,workTime,workInfo, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES (#positionid#,#workTime#,#workInfo#, #validflag#,#addoperator#,#addtime#,#memo#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE a_position_workrecord_t SET workTime=#workTime#,workInfo=#workInfo#, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
UPDATE a_position_workrecord_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator=#updateoperator#,updatetime=#updatetime# WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT apw.* FROM a_position_workrecord_t apw WHERE apw.positionid=#positionid# and apw.validflag>0 order by apw.addtime
